data.name: drpdownOther.PropBag
data.value: <?xml version="1.0"?><Blob><DataCols><C1DataColumn Caption="number" DataField="number"><FilterCancelText>&Close</FilterCancelText><FilterClearText>C&lear</FilterClearText><ValueItems /><GroupInfo /></C1DataColumn><C1DataColumn Caption="name" DataField="name"><FilterCancelText>&Close</FilterCancelText><FilterClearText>C&lear</FilterClearText><ValueItems /><GroupInfo /></C1DataColumn></DataCols><Styles type="C1.Win.C1TrueDBGrid.Design.ContextWrapper"><Data>Group{BackColor:ControlDark;Border:None,,0, 0, 0, 0;AlignVert:Center;}Style5{}Style16{AlignHorz:Near;}Style17{}Selected{ForeColor:White;BackColor:DarkCyan;}FilterWatermark{ForeColor:InfoText;BackColor:Info;}Style30{}Style10{AlignHorz:Near;}Style18{}Caption{AlignHorz:Center;}EvenRow{ForeColor:Black;BackColor:OldLace;}Style8{}Style14{}Style19{}Style2{}Normal{Alpha:255;Trimming:Character;AlignVert:Center;GradientMode:None;Font:Microsoft Sans Serif, 9.75pt;ForegroundImagePos:LeftOfText;AlignHorz:Near;ForeColor:White;BackColor:SandyBrown;AlignImage:Stretch;}Style6{}Style4{}Style27{AlignHorz:Near;}Style31{}Footer{}OddRow{ForeColor:Black;BackColor:LemonChiffon;}FilterBar{}Style7{}Style20{}Style11{}Style28{AlignHorz:Near;}Editor{}Heading{Wrap:True;AlignVert:Center;Border:Flat,ControlDark,0, 1, 0, 1;ForeColor:ControlText;BackColor:Control;}Style29{}Style32{}Style12{}Style15{AlignHorz:Near;}Style9{}Style3{}RecordSelector{AlignImage:Center;}Inactive{ForeColor:InactiveCaptionText;BackColor:InactiveCaption;}HighlightRow{ForeColor:White;BackColor:DarkCyan;}Style13{}Style1{}</Data></Styles><Splits><C1.Win.C1TrueDBGrid.DropdownView AllowColMove="False" Name="" AlternatingRowStyle="True" CaptionHeight="17" ColumnCaptionHeight="17" ColumnFooterHeight="17" ExtendRightColumn="True" MarqueeStyle="DottedCellBorder" RecordSelectorWidth="17" DefRecSelWidth="17" RecordSelectors="False" VerticalScrollGroup="1" HorizontalScrollGroup="1"><CaptionStyle parent="Style2" me="Style10" /><EditorStyle parent="Editor" me="Style5" /><EvenRowStyle parent="EvenRow" me="Style8" /><FilterBarStyle parent="FilterBar" me="Style13" /><FilterWatermarkStyle parent="FilterWatermark" me="Style14" /><FooterStyle parent="Footer" me="Style3" /><GroupStyle parent="Group" me="Style12" /><HeadingStyle parent="Heading" me="Style2" /><HighLightRowStyle parent="HighlightRow" me="Style7" /><InactiveStyle parent="Inactive" me="Style4" /><OddRowStyle parent="OddRow" me="Style9" /><RecordSelectorStyle parent="RecordSelector" me="Style11" /><SelectedStyle parent="Selected" me="Style6" /><Style parent="Normal" me="Style1" me="Style18" /><GroupHeaderStyle parent="Style1" me="Style20" /><GroupFooterStyle parent="Style1" me="Style19" /><Visible>True</Visible><ColumnDivider>DarkGray,Single</ColumnDivider><Width>80</Width><Height>22</Height><DCIdx>0</DCIdx></C1DisplayColumn><C1DisplayColumn><HeadingStyle parent="Style2" me="Style27" /><Style parent="Style1" me="Style28" /><FooterStyle parent="Style3" me="Style29" /><EditorStyle parent="Style5" me="Style30" /><GroupHeaderStyle parent="Style1" me="Style32" /><GroupFooterStyle parent="Style1" me="Style31" /><Visible>True</Visible><ColumnDivider>DarkGray,Single</ColumnDivider><Height>22</Height><DCIdx>1</DCIdx></C1DisplayColumn></internalCols><ClientRect>0, 0, 199, 136</ClientRect><BorderSide>0</BorderSide></C1.Win.C1TrueDBGrid.DropdownView></Splits><NamedStyles><Style parent="" me="Normal" /><Style parent="Normal" me="Heading" /><Style parent="Heading" me="Footer" /><Style parent="Heading" me="Caption" /><Style parent="Heading" me="Inactive" /><Style parent="Normal" me="Selected" /><Style parent="Normal" me="Editor" /><Style parent="Normal" parent="FilterBar" me="FilterWatermark" /><Style parent="Caption" me="Group" type="C1.Win.C1TrueDBGrid.Design.ContextWrapper"><Data>Style128{AlignHorz:Near;}Group{AlignVert:Center;Border:None,,0, 0, 0, 0;BackColor:ControlDark;}Style127{AlignHorz:Near;}Style109{}Style135{}Style152{}Style138{}Style136{}Selected{BackColor2:MidnightBlue;ForeColor:HighlightText;BackColor:DarkCyan;}Style116{AlignHorz:Near;}Style104{}FilterWatermark{Padding:0, 0, 0, 0;AlignVert:Center;ForeColor:DarkRed;BackColor:Info;}Style130{}Style120{}Style119{}Style151{}Style114{}Style112{AlignHorz:Near;BackColor:DarkOliveGreen;}Style144{}Caption{AlignHorz:Center;}EvenRow{ForeColor:Black;BackColor:Lavender;}Style143{}HighlightRow{GradientMode:ForwardDiagonal;BackColor2:ForestGreen;ForeColor:Black;BackColor:Honeydew;GammaCorrection:True;}Style129{}Style106{}Style111{}Style124{}Style122{AlignHorz:Near;}Style108{}Normal{Alpha:255;Trimming:Character;ForegroundImagePos:LeftOfText;AlignVert:Top;GradientMode:None;Wrap:True;Font:Microsoft Sans Serif, 9.75pt;GammaCorrection:False;AlignHorz:General;BackColor2:White;BackColor:White;AlignImage:Stretch;}Style139{AlignHorz:Near;}Style137{}Inactive{GradientMode:None;ForeColor:InactiveCaptionText;BackColor:ButtonShadow;GammaCorrection:False;}Style148{}Style146{AlignHorz:Near;}Style132{}Style103{}Style105{}Style121{Trimming:Character;AlignVert:Center;GradientMode:Vertical;Wrap:True;ForegroundImagePos:LeftOfText;AlignHorz:Near;Alpha:255;AlignImage:Stretch;}Footer{GradientMode:None;AlignHorz:Center;Border:Inset,,1, 1, 1, 1;ForeColor:AliceBlue;BackColor:DarkOliveGreen;GammaCorrection:False;}OddRow{ForeColor:Black;}Style126{}FilterBar{Font:Microsoft Sans Serif, 9.75pt;Padding:0, 0, 0, 0;AlignVert:Center;Border:Inset,,1, 1, 1, 1, 0,
